scope: The dominant leakage risk in time series (modality-specific leakage callout: overlapping windows crossing split boundaries) and how to validate correctly with purge gaps.
key_concepts: Applying standard random cross-validation to time series data is a fundamental error. It breaks temporal order, allowing the model to train on future data to predict the past.
Look-ahead leakage occurs when any information from the prediction horizon leaks back into the training features.
The correct approach is temporal splitting, where the training split always strictly precedes the validation split in time.

Modality-specific leakage risk: Because windowing creates overlapping samples, the end of the training set and the start of the validation set often share the same underlying raw data in their lookback windows.

To maintain praktik pipeline yang benar, a 'purge gap' must be inserted between splits. This gap drops a number of samples equal to the lookback window plus the horizon, ensuring no raw data is shared.

definitions.meaning: A form of data leakage where future information inadvertently informs predictions about the past or present.
A deliberate exclusion of overlapping samples between temporal splits to guarantee the validation set shares no historical data with the training set.

examples: Using random K-Fold on daily stock data might allow the model to learn from Friday's crash while trying to predict Thursday's closing price.
Dropping 7 days of samples between the end of the training split and the start of the test split because the lookback window is 7 days.

relations.to_chapter_2: Applies the core concepts of 'praktik pipeline yang benar' and leakage from Chapter 2 specifically to the temporal domain.

figures.caption: Temporal Splitting dan Purge Gap
figures.description: Visualisasi pemisahan data temporal (train lalu test) yang menyoroti perlunya purge gap (celah sampel yang dibuang) di antara keduanya agar jendela lookback dari set validasi tidak tumpang-tindih dengan set pelatihan.

exclusions: Combinatorial purged cross-validation (keep it to simple temporal splits and gaps).
